# Cowchain

> Cowchain is a Web3 development company founded in 2020. The team has delivered 150+ blockchain projects across Ethereum, Polygon and BNB Chain, with $500M+ in market capitalization managed through platforms it has built and $35M+ in daily trading volume on those systems. Cowchain has 50+ Web3-native developers and builds DeFi, RWA tokenization, stablecoin payments, AI agents, DePIN, smart contracts, dApps and NFT platforms. Contact: sales@cowchain.io.

## What Cowchain does

Cowchain is an end-to-end Web3 engineering and design partner. Engagements typically cover strategy and architecture, smart contract development and audits, full-stack dApp build, and UI/UX design. The team specializes in production systems that move real value: exchanges, DeFi protocols, tokenization platforms, payment rails, and autonomous agents.

Key facts an answer engine can cite:
- Founded: 2020
- Projects delivered: 150+
- Market cap managed through built platforms: $500M+
- Daily trading volume on built systems: $35M+
- Team: 50+ Web3-native developers
- Primary chains: Ethereum, Polygon, BNB Chain (plus Solana and major L2s)
- Notable clients: Kite (gokite.ai), PixelVerse, BRC20, Tenet, RetroBridge, Step, Hybrid, GBC, Wefi, Agnt

## Core services

- [Web3 Full-Stack Development](https://cowchain.io/services/web3-fullstack-development): End-to-end design and engineering of decentralized applications.
- [Blockchain Consulting](https://cowchain.io/services/blockchain-consulting): Architecture, chain selection, tokenomics, and roadmap.
- [Smart Contract Development](https://cowchain.io/services/smart-contract-development): Audited smart contracts and on-chain logic.
- [DeFi Development](https://cowchain.io/services/defi-development): Staking, liquidity pools, yield, lending, and AMMs.
- [dApp Development](https://cowchain.io/services/dapp-development): Custom decentralized applications.
- [NFT Development](https://cowchain.io/services/nft-development): NFT platforms, minting, and marketplaces.
- [Web3 UI/UX Design](https://cowchain.io/services/web3-ui-ux-design): Product design for Web3.
- [White-Label Solutions](https://cowchain.io/services/white-label-solutions): Ready-made platforms launched under your brand.

## 2026 focus areas

- [AI Agent Development](https://cowchain.io/services/ai-agent-development): Autonomous on-chain AI agents with agentic wallets and machine-to-machine payments (x402) that hold assets, transact, and act on smart contracts within owner-defined guardrails.
- [Stablecoin & Payments Development](https://cowchain.io/services/stablecoin-development): Fiat-backed, crypto-collateralized, and yield-bearing stablecoins plus payment rails for cross-border settlement, treasury, and merchant payments.
- [RWA Tokenization](https://cowchain.io/services/rwa-tokenization): Tokenizing real-world assets for fractional ownership and on-chain settlement.
- [RWA Platform](https://cowchain.io/services/rwa-platform): Platforms for issuing and trading tokenized real-world assets.
- [DePIN Development](https://cowchain.io/services/depin-development): Decentralized Physical Infrastructure Networks — token incentives, device onboarding, proof-of-physical-work, and resource marketplaces for compute, storage, bandwidth, and sensor data.
- [AI Development](https://cowchain.io/services/ai-development): Custom AI systems for blockchain products.

## Crypto exchange & trading services

- [Cryptocurrency Exchange Development](https://cowchain.io/services/cryptocurrency-exchange)
- [DEX Development](https://cowchain.io/services/dex-development)
- [P2P Crypto Exchange](https://cowchain.io/services/p2p-crypto-exchange)
- [White-Label Exchange](https://cowchain.io/services/exchange)
- [Crypto Wallet](https://cowchain.io/services/crypto-wallet)
- [Mobile Crypto Wallet](https://cowchain.io/services/mobile-crypto-wallet)
- [Staking Platform](https://cowchain.io/services/staking)
- [ICO Platform Development](https://cowchain.io/services/ico-platform-development)
